16	open AlgebraicGeometry CategoryTheory
17	
18	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
19	
20	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — restriction of modules to a basic open -/
21	
22	variable {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (f : R)
23	
24	/-- The basic open `D(f) ⊆ Spec R`, as an open subscheme of `Spec R`. -/
25	abbrev specBasicOpen : (Spec R).Opens := PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f
26	
27	/-- The localisation morphism `Spec R_f ⟶ Spec R` factoring through `D(f)`: the inverse of the
28	affine identification `D(f) ≅ Spec R_f` followed by the open immersion of `D(f)`. -/
29	noncomputable abbrev specAwayToSpec :
30	    Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away f)) ⟶ Spec R :=
31	  (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv ≫ (specBasicOpen f).ι
32	
33	/-- **Stacks 01I8, `lemma-widetilde-pullback`.** Restriction of an `𝒪_{Spec R}`-module to the basic
34	open `D(f)`, transported to a sheaf of `𝒪_{Spec R_f}`-modules along the affine identification
35	`D(f) ≅ Spec R_f`.  Built by restricting first along the open immersion `D(f) ↪ Spec R`, then along
36	the (iso, hence open) inverse of `basicOpenIsoSpecAway f`.  Project-local: assembles two Mathlib
37	restrictions into the single transport used by the affine quasi-coherence equivalence. -/
38	noncomputable def modulesRestrictBasicOpen (F : (Spec R).Modules) :
39	    (Spec (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away f))).Modules :=
40	  (F.restrict (specBasicOpen f).ι).restrict (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv
41	
42	/-- **Stacks 01I8, `lemma-widetilde-pullback`.** The transported restriction
43	`modulesRestrictBasicOpen f F` is canonically isomorphic to the inverse image of `F` along the
44	localisation morphism `Spec R_f ⟶ Spec R`.  This identifies the double restriction with a single
45	pullback, and is the comparison isomorphism `F|_{D(f)} ≅ F_{(f)}` of the blueprint.  Project-local:
46	reconciles the (good-defeq) iterated `restrict` with the conceptual inverse-image description. -/
47	noncomputable def modulesRestrictBasicOpenIso (F : (Spec R).Modules) :
48	    modulesRestrictBasicOpen f F ≅
49	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (specAwayToSpec f)).obj F :=
50	  ((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorComp (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv (specBasicOpen f).ι).app F).symm
51	    ≪≫ (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback (specAwayToSpec f)).app F
52	
53	/-- The localisation morphism `Spec R_f ⟶ Spec R` of `specAwayToSpec` is exactly the spectrum of the
54	away-localisation ring map `R → R_f`.  Project-local: identifies the geometric transport map with
55	the algebraic `Spec.map (algebraMap …)`, so that pullback along it computes base change. -/
56	theorem specAwayToSpec_eq :
57	    specAwayToSpec f = Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap R (Localization.Away f))) := by
58	  rw [specAwayToSpec, Iso.inv_comp_eq]
59	  exact (IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq_hom_fac _ _ _).symm
60	
61	end AlgebraicGeometry
62

160	
161	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — R-linear packaging of the Ab-stalk map -/
162	
163	/-- **Germ–scalar compatibility (`R`-linearity of the germ map).**  For `s` a section of `M^~`
164	over `U` and `r : R`, the germ at `x` of `(algebraMap R Γ(O_X,U) r) • s` equals `r •` the germ of
165	`s` (the `R`-action on the stalk being the localisation one through `tilde.toStalk R x`).  This is
166	the section-level half of "the `Ab`-stalk map of `~f` is `R`-linear".  Project-local because the
167	linear germ `StructureSheaf.germₗ` is not exported (no `public`); it is rebuilt here from the public
168	`PresheafOfModules.germ_smul` and `StructureSheaf.algebraMap_germ_apply`. -/
169	theorem tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul {M : ModuleCat R} (U : (Spec (.of R)).Opens)
170	    (x : PrimeSpectrum.Top R) (hxU : x ∈ U) (r : R) (s : Γ(AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M, U)) :
171	    (ConcreteCategory.hom
172	        ((AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M).presheaf.germ U x hxU))
173	        ((algebraMap R Γ(Spec (.of R), U) r) • s)
174	      = r • (ConcreteCategory.hom
175	        ((AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M).presheaf.germ U x hxU)) s := by
176	  erw [PresheafOfModules.germ_smul, StructureSheaf.algebraMap_germ_apply]
177	  rfl
178	
179	/-- **Sub-step (A): the `Ab`-stalk map `σ_x` is `R`-linear.**  The stalk-functor image
180	`σ_x := (stalkFunctor Ab x).map (toPresheaf.map (~f))` is a priori only an `Ab`-morphism between
181	the stalks; this packages it as the genuine `R`-linear map `M_𝔭 →ₗ[R] N_𝔭`.  Project-local: the
182	`ModuleCat R`-valued stalk functor for `SheafOfModules` is not exported (its building blocks
183	`stalkIsoₗ`/`toStalkₗ'` are private), so the linear structure is reconstructed here on the public
184	`Ab` stalk via germ-linearity. -/
185	noncomputable def stalkMapₗ {M N : ModuleCat R} (f : M ⟶ N) (x : PrimeSpectrum.Top R) :
186	    (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M).presheaf.stalk x →ₗ[R]
187	      (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde N).presheaf.stalk x where
188	  toFun := (TopCat.Presheaf.stalkFunctor _ x).map
189	    ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf (Spec (.of R))).map (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.map f))
190	  map_add' a b := map_add _ a b
191	  map_smul' r ζ := by
192	    dsimp only [RingHom.id_apply]
193	    obtain ⟨U, hxU, s, rfl⟩ := TopCat.Presheaf.germ_exist (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde M).presheaf x ζ
194	    rw [← tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul U x hxU r s]
195	    erw [TopCat.Presheaf.stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply U x hxU
196	        ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf (Spec (.of R))).map (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.map f)),
197	      TopCat.Presheaf.stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply U x hxU
198	        ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf (Spec (.of R))).map (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.map f))]
199	    rw [Scheme.Modules.toPresheaf_map, Scheme.Modules.mapPresheaf_app]
200	    simp only [Opposite.unop_op]
201	    erw [Scheme.Modules.Hom.app_smul, tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul U x hxU r]
202	    rfl
203	
204	/-- **Identification of `σ_x` with the localised module map.**  The `R`-linear `Ab`-stalk map
205	`stalkMapₗ f x` is exactly the localisation `M_𝔭 →ₗ[R] N_𝔭` of `f`, i.e.
206	`IsLocalizedModule.map _ (toStalk M x) (toStalk N x) f`.  Both are `R`-linear and agree on the image
207	of the localisation map `tilde.toStalk M x` (by `tilde_stalkFunctor_map_toStalk`), so they coincide
208	by `IsLocalizedModule.ext`.  Project-local: it packages the otherwise opaque germ-induced stalk map
209	as the concrete localised map, whose flatness-injectivity is `tilde_toStalk_map_injective`. -/
210	theorem stalkMapₗ_eq {M N : ModuleCat R} (f : M ⟶ N) (x : PrimeSpectrum.Top R) :
211	    stalkMapₗ f x = IsLocalizedModule.map x.asIdeal.primeCompl
212	      (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toStalk M x).hom (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toStalk N x).hom
213	      f.hom := by
214	  apply IsLocalizedModule.ext x.asIdeal.primeCompl (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toStalk M x).hom
215	    (fun s => IsLocalizedModule.map_units (AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toStalk N x).hom s)
216	  ext m
217	  change stalkMapₗ f x ((AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toStalk M x).hom m) = _
218	  rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, IsLocalizedModule.map_apply]
219	  exact tilde_stalkFunctor_map_toStalk f x m
220	
221	/-- **Stalkwise injectivity of `~f` for a monomorphism `f`.**  For an injective `R`-module map
222	`f`, the `R`-linear `Ab`-stalk map `σ_x = stalkMapₗ f x` of `~f` is injective at every point `x`.
223	This is the stalkwise-flatness contribution to mono-preservation of `~`, now stated on the genuine
224	linear stalk map: it combines the identification `stalkMapₗ_eq` with the localisation injectivity
225	`tilde_toStalk_map_injective`.  Project-local stepping stone toward `tildePreservesFiniteLimits`. -/
226	theorem stalkMapₗ_injective {M N : ModuleCat R} (f : M ⟶ N) (hf : Function.Injective f.hom)
227	    (x : PrimeSpectrum.Top R) : Function.Injective (stalkMapₗ f x) := by
228	  rw [stalkMapₗ_eq]
229	  exact tilde_toStalk_map_injective f hf x
230	
231	end AlgebraicGeometry
232

=== PROJECT_STATUS.md (head 60) ===
# Project Status

## Overall Progress

Reset on extraction (`archon extract`) from the Algebraic-Jacobian challenge.

This subproject's scope is the Čech computation of higher direct images
(`AlgebraicGeometry.cech_computes_higherDirectImage`, `lem:cech_computes_cohomology`)
and its 12-node dependency cone. See `PROGRESS.md` for the open-obligation inventory and
`STRATEGY.md` for the proof arc. The parent project's prover-execution history and
knowledge base were left behind with the carved-away material; this file will be
repopulated by this subproject's own review phase.

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **`(Spec R).Opens` defeq impedance (iter-032, `standard_cover_cofinal`)**: the carrier of `(Spec R).Opens` is
  `↥(Spec R)`, defeq but not syntactically equal to `PrimeSpectrum ↑R`. Coercing a *variable* `Uf : (Spec R).Opens`
  to `Set ↥(Spec R)` works; coercing an inline ascription `(PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen r : (Spec R).Opens)` to
  `Set ↥(Spec R)` does NOT (the SetLike coercion is not inserted, giving "type mismatch … Opens (PrimeSpectrum ↑R)
  vs Set ↥(Spec R)"). FIX: bind first via `set Uf : (Spec R).Opens := PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f` and
  `let B : R → (Spec R).Opens := fun r => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen r`, then coerce `Uf`/`B r`. Use `change` not
  `show` (dodges the show-tactic linter). Cofinal-refinement skeleton: `PrimeSpectrum.isCompact_basicOpen` +
  `PrimeSpectrum.isTopologicalBasis_basic_opens` + `IsTopologicalBasis.exists_subset_of_mem_open` +
  `IsCompact.elim_finite_subcover`, index type `{p : R × α // B p.1 ≤ Uf ⊓ W p.2}` carrying the cover witness,
  reindexed to `Fin t.card` via `Finset.equivFin` + `Equiv.symm_apply_apply`.
- **`IsLocalizedModule` is local on a finite spanning cover (iter-032, `isLocalizedModule_of_span_cover`, 01I8 P1b)**:
  to prove `g : M →ₗ[R] N` is `IsLocalizedModule (powers f)` from per-`j` localised versions over a unit-ideal
  spanning family `s : Fin n → R` (`Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤`), discharge the three clauses directly (no
  `of_localized_span` exists for `IsLocalizedModule` itself):
  (1) `map_units` — `Module.End.isUnit_iff` + `Module.algebraMap_end_apply` reduces to `f`; identify the per-`r`
  localised endomorphism with mult-by-`f` via a helper (`LocalizedModule.map_mk`), then Mathlib
  `bijective_of_localized_span` (from `Mathlib.RingTheory.LocalProperties.Exactness`) gives the unit.
  (2) `surj` / (3) `exists_of_eq` — partition of unity from `Ideal.span_pow_eq_top` +
  `Ideal.mem_span_range_iff_exists_fun`: per-cover-member extract `(s j)^a • f^k • · = ·` via
  `IsLocalizedModule.{surj,exists_of_eq,map_LocalizedModules}` + `LocalizedModule.{mk_eq,zero_mk,smul'_mk}`, BUMP
  all exponents to uniform `A,K`, then combine across the cover. The blueprint "`g_{s_j}`" is realised concretely as
  `IsLocalizedModule.map (powers (s j)) (mkLinearMap..) (mkLinearMap..) g`.
- **Affine cover-system fields (iter-029)**: (1) `faces_mem` = finite intersection of distinguished opens is
  distinguished — `⟨∏ k, s (σ k), (basicOpen_sprod (p+1) s σ).symm⟩` in membership-in-range shape. (2)
  Standard-cover member opensRange = `D(s_i)` — `unfold coverOpen; change …opensRange; Opens.ext;
  rw [Spec.map_base]; exact PrimeSpectrum.localization_away_comap_range (Localization.Away (s i)) (s i)` (the
  `change` steps are LSP-confirmed but mildly fragile). (3) `Finite I₀` does NOT auto-synthesize through the
  `AffineOpenCover` def — supply `haveI : Finite (…).openCover.I₀ := inferInstanceAs (Finite ι)`. (4) Namespace
  gotcha: `affineOpenCoverOfSpanRangeEqTop` lives under `Scheme`, then `.openCover`.
- **Affine structure theorem, conditional form (iter-029, Stacks 01HV)**: `qcoh_iso_tilde_sections` =
  `(asIso F.fromTildeΓ).symm` with `[IsIso F.fromTildeΓ]`; `moduleSpecΓFunctor.obj F` is defeq the counit
  domain `(modulesSpecToSheaf.obj F).presheaf.obj (op ⊤)` so the codomain types up. Discharge the hypothesis
  via `isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation F P` for a global `F.Presentation`. Mathlib provides
  `Scheme.Modules.fromTildeΓ`, `isIso_fromTildeΓ_iff`, `isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation`
  (`Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/Modules/Tilde.lean`). `IsQuasicoherent F` supplies only LOCAL `QuasicoherentData`,
  never a global presentation — that gap IS Stacks 01I8 (see Known Blockers).
- **01I8 steps (2)–(3) — two GeneratingSections ⟹ `IsIso fromTildeΓ` (iter-030, Stacks 01I8)**: package the
  two global generating families `σ : F.GeneratingSections` (epi `free σ.I ⟶ F`) and
  `τ : (kernel σ.π).GeneratingSections` into an `F.Presentation` then feed Mathlib's
  `isIso_fromTildeΓ_of_presentation`. **Universe gotcha:** build the presentation in TACTIC mode
  (`have P : F.Presentation := { generators := σ, relations := τ }`) — the term-mode anonymous constructor
  defaults the `Presentation` universes to `0` and the application type-mismatches. `free` is recognised qcoh via
  `free ι ≅ tilde (ι →₀ R)` (Mathlib `tildeFinsupp`) + iso-closure
  `(SheafOfModules.isQuasicoherent.{u} _).prop_of_iso (tildeFinsupp (R := R) ι) inferInstance` — the `.{u}`

19	`R_x×R_y → R_{xy}` whose cokernel contains `x⁻¹y⁻¹ ∉ R_x+R_y`, so `Ȟ¹(O)≠0`. The lvb's "sections over the
20	total intersection equal a localised module, hence exact" reasoning conflates the total-intersection section
21	with the *complex's cohomology* — exactness needs the augmentation by `R`, i.e. the covering condition. So the

# Session 35 (iter-035) — review summary

## Metadata
- **Iteration / session**: iter-035 / session_35
- **Total sorry**: 2 → 2 (no regression). Both frozen/superseded (`CechAcyclic.affine` dead with
  sorry; `CechHigherDirectImage.lean:~679` frozen P5b). Both prover files are 0-sorry.
- **Build**: GREEN. Both edited files `lake env lean … EXIT 0`, diagnostics empty.
- **Lanes planned 2, ran 2** (both `mathlib-build`, distinct files). **+9 axiom-clean decls**
  (`QcohRestrictBasicOpen.lean` +5 new file, `TildeExactness.lean` +4 appended); 0 new sorries.
- `archon dag-query`: **gaps = 0**, **unmatched = 8** (1 pre-existing dead `CechAcyclic.affine`
  + 7 new prover helpers, see Coverage debt).

## Targets attempted

### Lane A — `QcohRestrictBasicOpen.lean` (NEW file, 01I8 Route-P step P1a, L1)
**Both named targets SOLVED, axiom-clean.**
- `modulesRestrictBasicOpen f F : (Spec R).Modules → (Spec R_f).Modules` — the transport of
  `F|_{D(f)}` to a sheaf of `O_{Spec R_f}`-modules, built as the iterated Mathlib restriction
  `(F.restrict (specBasicOpen f).ι).restrict (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv`.
- `modulesRestrictBasicOpenIso f F : modulesRestrictBasicOpen f F ≅ (Scheme.Modules.pullback (specAwayToSpec f)).obj F`
  — the comparison iso `F|_{D(f)} ≅ F_{(f)}`, via
  `(restrictFunctorComp …).app F).symm ≪≫ (restrictFunctorIsoPullback …).app F`.
- Feeder `specAwayToSpec_eq : specAwayToSpec f = Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap R (Localization.Away f)))`
  (proof `rw [specAwayToSpec, Iso.inv_comp_eq]; exact (IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq_hom_fac _ _ _).symm`).
  Reduces L2 to a single clean gap.
- Helpers `specBasicOpen`, `specAwayToSpec` (abbrevs).

**Blocked (correctly, no sorry):** `tilde_restrict_basicOpen` (L2) and `presentation_restrict_basicOpen`
(L3). L2 is exactly Stacks 01I8 `lemma-widetilde-pullback` — *pullback/base-change compatibility of
`tilde`*: `pullback (Spec.map φ) ∘ tilde ≅ tilde ∘ baseChange φ`. Confirmed ABSENT from Mathlib via
`loogle`/`leansearch` (no results). The section-level instance
`tilde.instAway…ToOpen : IsLocalizedModule.Away f (tilde.toOpen M (basicOpen f))` exists but lifting it
to a full sheaf-of-modules iso over `Spec R_f` is multi-hundred-LOC (same order as the
`qcoh_iso_tilde_sections` crux). L3 is transitively blocked on L2.

### Lane B — `TildeExactness.lean` (01I8 Route-P step P3, sub-step A)
**4 helpers SOLVED, axiom-clean** — the precise partial the plan named as preferable to a typed pin:
- `tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul` — germ is `R`-linear (`erw [PresheafOfModules.germ_smul,
  StructureSheaf.algebraMap_germ_apply]; rfl`), rebuilding the unexported `StructureSheaf.germₗ.map_smul`.
- `stalkMapₗ` (`noncomputable def`) — the public `Ab`-stalk map packaged as a genuine `R`-LINEAR map
  `(tilde M).presheaf.stalk x →ₗ[R] (tilde N).presheaf.stalk x`. The `map_smul'` field is the new content.
- `stalkMapₗ_eq` — identifies `stalkMapₗ f x` with `IsLocalizedModule.map _ (toStalk M x) (toStalk N x) f`
  via `IsLocalizedModule.ext` + the iter-034 germ-naturality helper `tilde_stalkFunctor_map_toStalk`.
  Genuine identification of two differently-constructed maps (auditor + lvb both confirm not a tautology).
- `stalkMapₗ_injective` — stalkwise injectivity for a mono (`rw [stalkMapₗ_eq]; exact tilde_toStalk_map_injective …`).

**Blocked (correctly, no sorry):** the named target `tildePreservesFiniteLimits`. It is NOT one hard
step but a multi-decl categorical build: natural-iso packaging of the stalk composite + localisation-is-
flat finite-limit preservation + jointly-reflecting stalk lift. **Infra blocker found:**
`Scheme.Modules.toSheaf` does not exist, so `toPresheaf` lands in *presheaves* where stalks do not jointly
reflect isos; `preservesLimitsOfShape_of_evaluation` then reduces to sections-over-each-`U` (the
sheaf-condition equalizer of products of localisations), not a single localisation.

## Key findings / patterns
- **`erw`, not `rw`, around structure-sheaf ring sections**: the section `Γ(Spec R, U)` appears in ≥3
  defeq-but-not-syntactic forms (`Γ(Spec (.of R), U)`, `(structurePresheafInCommRingCat R).obj (op U)`,
  `(structureSheafInType R R).obj.obj (op U)`); scalar/algebra instances live on different ones. State
  germ lemmas on `(tilde M).presheaf.germ` (not `(moduleStructurePresheaf R M).presheaf.germ`) so callers' `rw` match.
- **R-linearity of an `Ab`-valued map must be proved INSIDE the `LinearMap` structure**: a standalone
  `r • σ ζ` statement fails `HSMul` synthesis (the stalk codomain is only DEFEQ to `(tilde N).presheaf.stalk x`).
- **`Scheme.Modules.Hom.app (~f) U` lands in `Ab`, not `ModuleCat O_X(U)`**; its `O_X(U)`-linearity is the
  dedicated `Scheme.Modules.Hom.app_smul` (found via `exact?`), not `map_smul` of a `.hom`.
- **`specAwayToSpec_eq` technique**: `basicOpenIsoSpecAway` is *definitionally*
  `IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq (Opens.ι _) (Spec.map (ofHom (algebraMap …)))`, so `Iso.inv_comp_eq` +
  `isoOfRangeEq_hom_fac` identifies the geometric transport with the algebraic `Spec.map (algebraMap)`.

## Reviewer subagent results
- **lean-auditor `iter035`** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter035.md`): 0 must-fix, 0 major, 3 minor — all
  stale-docstring fragments (TildeExactness header item (a) is now delivered but still listed; "germₗ"
  approach reference bypassed; QcohRestrictBasicOpen docstring over-claims "Stacks 01I8 lemma-widetilde-

  `opaque` scanner hits are the English word in docstrings, not the keyword.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker `qcoh-iter035`** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-qcoh-iter035.md`):
  no must-fix. Both named targets faithfully realize `lem:modules_restrict_basicOpen`. 3 majors, all
  **structural** (not Lean-correctness): missing root import (blocks sync_leanok), missing `% archon:covers`
  entry, 3 unreferenced helpers. `tilde_restrict_basicOpen`/`presentation_restrict_basicOpen` correctly
  absent + honestly unmarked.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker `tilde-iter035`** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tilde-iter035.md`):
  no must-fix. The 4 helpers faithfully realize sub-step (A); `stalkMapₗ_eq` is a genuine identification.
  Major = coverage debt (4 unreferenced helpers) + named-target absence (expected/documented). Minor = the
  remaining-build sketch lives only in `% NOTE`s, not formal proof-sketch steps.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex`, `lem:modules_restrict_basicOpen`: added `% NOTE:` recording that
  both named Lean targets are formalized + axiom-clean but `\leanok` is pending only because the new file is
  not yet imported by the root barrel (sync can't see it); planner action = wire import + add covers entry.

No `\mathlibok` added (all 9 new decls are project theorems, not bare Mathlib re-exports). No `\lean{...}`

with `QcohRestrictBasicOpen` being unimported and the TildeExactness helpers carrying no `\lean{}` block).

## Notes (low severity)
- The covers-list omission of `QcohRestrictBasicOpen.lean` and the root-import gap are the same underlying

See `recommendations.md`. Headline: wire the root import for `QcohRestrictBasicOpen.lean` (unblocks
`\leanok` for `lem:modules_restrict_basicOpen`); the two genuinely-blocked targets (`tilde_restrict_basicOpen`

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **Restriction-to-`D(f)` transport + comparison iso (iter-035, `modulesRestrictBasicOpen`/`…Iso`, 01I8 P1a)**:
  to transport `F : (Spec R).Modules` to an `O_{Spec R_f}`-module, take the iterated Mathlib restriction
  `(F.restrict (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f).ι).restrict (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv` (restrict to `D(f)` along
  the open immersion, then along the inverse of the affine iso `basicOpenIsoSpecAway f : ↥D(f) ≅ Spec R_f`; the
  iso auto-synthesizes as an open immersion). The comparison iso to the honest pullback is
  `((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorComp i₁ i₂).app F).symm ≪≫ (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback g).app F`.
  Identify the geometric `specAwayToSpec f := (basicOpenIsoSpecAway f).inv ≫ (basicOpen f).ι` with the algebraic
  `Spec.map (ofHom (algebraMap R (Localization.Away f)))` by `rw […, Iso.inv_comp_eq]; exact
  (IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq_hom_fac _ _ _).symm` (`basicOpenIsoSpecAway` is DEFEQ `IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq`).
- **R-linearity of an `Ab`-valued stalk/section map (iter-035, `stalkMapₗ`, 01I8 P3 sub-step A)**: package the
  public `Ab`-stalk map `(stalkFunctor Ab x).map (toPresheaf.map (~f))` as a genuine `→ₗ[R]` map. CRITICAL: prove
  `map_smul'` INSIDE the `LinearMap` structure — a standalone `r • σ ζ` statement fails `HSMul` synthesis (the
  stalk codomain is only DEFEQ to `(tilde N).presheaf.stalk x`). Recipe for `map_smul'`: `germ_exist` to write
  `ζ = germ s`, rewrite `r • germ s = germ ((algebraMap r) • s)` (helper `tilde_germ_algebraMap_smul`, reversed),
  `stalkFunctor_map_germ_apply` ×2 to commute through germs, `toPresheaf_map`/`mapPresheaf_app`/`simp [Opposite.unop_op]`,
  then `Scheme.Modules.Hom.app_smul` (the `O_X(U)`-linearity of `Hom.app`, which lands in `Ab` NOT `ModuleCat O_X(U)`;
  found via `exact?`) + helper forward + `rfl`. Use `erw` around structure-sheaf ring sections (≥3 defeq forms);
  state germ lemmas on `(tilde M).presheaf.germ` not `(moduleStructurePresheaf R M).presheaf.germ` for caller match.
  Identify the result with `IsLocalizedModule.map` via `IsLocalizedModule.ext` (agree on image of `toStalk M x`) +
  the iter-034 germ-naturality helper `tilde_stalkFunctor_map_toStalk` (insert `LinearMap.comp_apply` before `map_apply`).

## Summary

**Iter-035 outcome: clean, productive iteration — both planned `mathlib-build` lanes ran, +9 axiom-clean decls, sorry 2→2, build green, gaps 0.**

- **Lane A** — NEW file `QcohRestrictBasicOpen.lean` (01I8 P1a L1): both named targets `modulesRestrictBasicOpen` + `modulesRestrictBasicOpenIso` (restriction-to-`D(f)` transport + comparison iso) plus the `specAwayToSpec_eq` feeder, all axiom-clean.
- **Lane B** — `TildeExactness.lean` (01I8 P3 sub-step A): `stalkMapₗ` (the `Ab`-stalk map packaged as a genuine `R`-linear map), `stalkMapₗ_eq` (a real identification with `IsLocalizedModule.map`), `stalkMapₗ_injective`, and the germ-linearity lemma — all axiom-clean.

**Three review subagents dispatched** (lean-auditor + 2× lean-vs-blueprint-checker): **zero must-fix, zero Lean-correctness defects.** All 9 decls confirmed genuine, non-vacuous, axiom-clean.

Flagged as HIGH for the planner (refactor to wire the import) — the planner already noted this in plan.md item 79.

**Two genuine deep blockers named** and added to Known Blockers: L2 `tilde_restrict_basicOpen` = absent-from-Mathlib `tilde` base-change compat (Stacks `lemma-widetilde-pullback`); `tildePreservesFiniteLimits` = `Scheme.Modules.toSheaf` absence. Both flagged: **do not re-dispatch as single steps without decomposition first.**
